response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills and a versatile background, but his experience lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ on Windows and capital markets/fixed income domains. His expertise in other languages and domains may offer transferable skills, but a deeper evaluation is needed to assess fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and software development experience across multiple languages and platforms.
Strong communication skills and knowledge-sharing, as evidenced by workshops and talks.
Proven ability to work in high-performance, low-latency environments (e.g., Dunnhumby media).
concerns: Limited explicit C++ experience on Windows (only 6 months at National Instruments).
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains.
Primary expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development, not the required C++/SQL Server/Oracle stack.
